toolArgs.query:
INSERT INTO jokes (joke, delivered_at) VALUES ('I used to hate facial hair... but then it grew on me!', 'turn-5');
SELECT COUNT(*) as jokes_so_far FROM jokes;
SELECT COUNT(*) as jokes_so_far FROM jokes;

INSERT INTO jokes (joke, delivered_at) VALUES ('I''m reading a book about anti-gravity... It''s impossible to put down!', 'turn-6');
